ddls:
CREATE TABLE "garment_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each garment type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the garment type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the garment type */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for which the garment is intended */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season for which the garment is suitable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "materials" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material */,
  "material_name" TEXT /* Name of the material */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the material */,
  "wash_care" TEXT /* Care instructions for the material */,
  "composition" TEXT /* Composition of the material */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "colors" (
  "color_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each color */,
  "color_name" TEXT /* Name of the color */,
  "hex_code" TEXT /* Hex code representing the color */,
  "rgb_code" TEXT /* RGB code representing the color */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("color_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size */,
  "numeric_size" INTEGER /* Numeric size for standardization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_charts" (
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the garment type */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "length_back" REAL /* Length of the garment (back) */,
  "shoulder" REAL /* Shoulder measurement */,
  "chest" REAL /* Chest measurement */,
  "sleeve_length" REAL /* Sleeve length */,
  "waist" REAL /* Waist measurement */,
  "hip" REAL /* Hip measurement */,
  "inseam" REAL /* Inseam measurement */,
  "sleeve_width" REAL /* Sleeve width measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES garment_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "garments" (
  "garment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each garment */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the garment type */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material */,
  "color_id" INTEGER /* ID of the color */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock-keeping unit for the garment */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the garment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the garment */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the garment image */,
  "available_from" TEXT /* Date from which the garment is available for sale */,
  "available_to" TEXT /* Date until which the garment is available for sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("garment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_garments_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_garments_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES garment_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_garments_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_garments_color_id FOREIGN KEY ("color_id") REFERENCES colors ("color_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "garment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the garment */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the garment in stock */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Inventory level at which a reorder should be triggered */,
  "last_restock_date" TEXT /* Date of the last restock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_garment_id FOREIGN KEY ("garment_id") REFERENCES garments ("garment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order */,
  "shipping_address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer's shipping address */,
  "billing_address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer's billing address */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_shipping_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("shipping_address_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_billing_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("billing_address_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "garment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the garment */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the garment ordered */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the garment */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_garment_id FOREIGN KEY ("garment_id") REFERENCES garments ("garment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Shipping address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping" (
  "shipping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping entry */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "ship_date" TEXT /* Date the order was shipped */,
  "carrier" TEXT /* Shipping carrier (e.g., USPS, UPS, FedEx) */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated delivery date */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Cost of shipping */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the return was processed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the return */,
  "return_method" TEXT /* Method of return */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "return_id" INTEGER /* ID of the return */,
  "new_garment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the new garment */,
  "exchange_date" TEXT /* Date the exchange was processed */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the exchange */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exchanges_return_id FOREIGN KEY ("return_id") REFERENCES returns ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exchanges_new_garment_id FOREIGN KEY ("new_garment_id") REFERENCES garments ("garment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, customer service) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed version of the user's password */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Activity performed by the user */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the activity occurred */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the activity was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
